title: cyperus lanceolatus var. helvus
intro: Cyperus lanceolatus var. helvus, also known as the yellow papyrus sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyperus lanceolatus var. helvus include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
